creator: matt@zigg.com
text:
I have similar problems with another Aztech drive, the AZT 26803I
SE.  Instead of probing correctly on bootup, I would get a few
atapi0.1: unknown phase errors.

In addition, on a soft reboot, the system would hang momentarily
on the wdc0 scan (no unknown phase errors this time around) and
refuse to mount / (which is on wd0s1a) due to timeout errors.
Cold-booting the system would allow mounting again but the drive
still would not be probed.

I seem to recall this drive working in the 2.2 tree as well, though
it was in my parts bin for awhile, dragged out so a machine could
have a drive, so I cannot say for certain.  I do have an old copy
of 2.1.5 lying around, maybe I'll try that. :-)

I know this is skimpy.  I shall try to get more information at a
later date.  But I thought it would be worth a "me too!" at this
point.

Matt Behrens <matt@zigg.com>
Owner/Administrator, zigg.com
Chief Engineer, Nameless IRC Network
